'''yongapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chainable|chainable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chainable|chainable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yongapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongapithi|yongapithi]] || [[word:yongapiji|yongapiji]] || [[word:yongapishi|yongapishi]] || [[word:yongapiki|yongapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongaputhuthu|yongaputhuthu]] || [[word:yongapujuju|yongapujuju]] || [[word:yongapushushu|yongapushushu]] || [[word:yongapukuku|yongapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongaputhu|yongaputhu]] || [[word:yongapuju|yongapuju]] || [[word:yongapushu|yongapushu]] || [[word:yongapuku|yongapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongapufthuf|yongapufthuf]] || [[word:yongapufjuf|yongapufjuf]] || [[word:yongapufshuf|yongapufshuf]] || [[word:yongapufkuf|yongapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongapethe|yongapethe]] || [[word:yongapeje|yongapeje]] || [[word:yongapeshe|yongapeshe]] || [[word:yongapeke|yongapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongapothotho|yongapothotho]] || [[word:yongapojojo|yongapojojo]] || [[word:yongaposhosho|yongaposhosho]] || [[word:yongapokoko|yongapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongapotho|yongapotho]] || [[word:yongapojo|yongapojo]] || [[word:yongaposho|yongaposho]] || [[word:yongapoko|yongapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongapofthof|yongapofthof]] || [[word:yongapofjof|yongapofjof]] || [[word:yongapofshof|yongapofshof]] || [[word:yongapofkof|yongapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongapïfthïf|yongapïfthïf]] || [[word:yongapïfjïf|yongapïfjïf]] || [[word:yongapïfshïf|yongapïfshïf]] || [[word:yongapïfkïf|yongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongapïfthïfthïf|yongapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yongapïfjïfjïf|yongapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yongapïfshïfshïf|yongapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yongapïfkïfkïf|yongapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongapïfthïf|yongapïfthïf]] || [[word:yongapïfjïf|yongapïfjïf]] || [[word:yongapïfshïf|yongapïfshïf]] || [[word:yongapïfkïf|yongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongapïfthïf|yongapïfthïf]] || [[word:yongapïfjïf|yongapïfjïf]] || [[word:yongapïfshïf|yongapïfshïf]] || [[word:yongapïfkïf|yongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongapæthæ|yongapæthæ]] || [[word:yongapæjæ|yongapæjæ]] || [[word:yongapæshæ|yongapæshæ]] || [[word:yongapækæ|yongapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongapathatha|yongapathatha]] || [[word:yongapajaja|yongapajaja]] || [[word:yongapashasha|yongapashasha]] || [[word:yongapakaka|yongapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongapatha|yongapatha]] || [[word:yongapaja|yongapaja]] || [[word:yongapasha|yongapasha]] || [[word:yongapaka|yongapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongapafthaf|yongapafthaf]] || [[word:yongapafjaf|yongapafjaf]] || [[word:yongapafshaf|yongapafshaf]] || [[word:yongapafkaf|yongapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yongapasha|yongapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yongapshësha|yongapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yongaprosha|yongaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yongapmusha|yongapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yongapyasha|yongapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyongapnkshësha|goyongapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyongapnkrosha|goyongapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyongapnkmusha|goyongapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyongapnkyasha|goyongapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yongangapasha|yongangapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yongangapshësha|yongangapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yongangaprosha|yongangaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yongangapmusha|yongangapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yongangapyasha|yongangapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyongangapnkshësha|goyongangapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyongangapnkrosha|goyongangapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyongangapnkmusha|goyongangapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyongangapnkyasha|goyongangapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yengæpasha|yengæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yengæpshësha|yengæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yengæprosha|yengæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yengæpmusha|yengæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yengæpyasha|yengæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyengæpnkshësha|goyengæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyengæpnkrosha|goyengæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyengæpnkmusha|goyengæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyengæpnkyasha|goyengæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yongfapasha|yongfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yongfapshësha|yongfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yongfaprosha|yongfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yongfapmusha|yongfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yongfapyasha|yongfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyongfapnkshësha|goyongfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyongfapnkrosha|goyongfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyongfapnkmusha|goyongfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyongfapnkyasha|goyongfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
